prompt: My Electron app has a dropdown menu in the top nav that should show 4 options when clicked, but it's only showing 2. I need to figure out if this is a data issue (the options aren't loaded) or a rendering issue (they're loaded but not visible). The app is running at localhost:3000. Can you help me debug this?

assertions.name: distinguishes_data_vs_render
assertions.description: Agent explicitly investigates whether the issue is a data problem or a rendering problem

assertions.name: uses_interaction_script
assertions.description: Agent uses a Python automation script or browser interaction to open the dropdown before screenshotting

assertions.name: screenshots_triggered_state
assertions.description: Agent captures a screenshot with the dropdown in its open/triggered state to see what's actually rendered

assertions.name: proposes_concrete_fix
assertions.description: Agent proposes a specific code change (not just 'investigate further')
